description_long: This is a small, single-propeller airplane with a streamlined fuselage and low-mounted straight wings. The aircraft is predominantly white with black and red accent stripes, red star insignias on the wings and fuselage, and a blue-tinted cockpit canopy. The tail features a conventional vertical stabilizer with horizontal stabilizers, and the registration 'HA-YAK' is visible on the rear fuselage. The landing gear is fixed, with two main wheels under the wings and a smaller nose wheel. The propeller is mounted at the nose, and the cockpit appears to be enclosed with multiple windows.
description: A small, white single-propeller airplane with low-mounted straight wings, red star markings, and a blue-tinted enclosed cockpit.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the propeller, cockpit windows, and left wing with red star marking.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the tail section, registration marking, and left wing.
description_view_2: Rear-right view displaying the right wing, tail, and cockpit canopy.
description_view_3: Front-right view focusing on the propeller, cockpit, and right wing with red star marking.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a multi-panel canopy and side windows.
